figures.caption: Fig. 4: Qualitative results on KITTI after finetuning. Each row shows (left to right): Input, Point Cloud, Depth.
Fig. 3: Training dynamics for indoor and outdoor contexts. We can see that naively scaling to more data yields few to no gains. Experiments done with distillation of two experts: indoor and outdoor.

Fig. 2: Overview of SS3D (1) Train self-supervised, sub-domain experts on multidomain web video. (2) Distill expert predictions into a single deployable student model. (3) At inference, the student predicts depth, pose, and intrinsics, which together induce a 3D reconstruction (e.g., point cloud) displayed on the far right. For illustration, “domains” are schematic and may not match the clustering used in training.
